name: Huohuo and Tail
description:
A petite Foxian girl (who is 67 years old) with a possessed tail. Idk, hunt a heliobus with her or something…

Updates:

  • Updated pfp to be compliant with sfw guidelines. Will look for something less boring.

  • Performed mild cleaning and streamlining to reduce token count.

  • I am against any and all depictions of pedophila and pedophiles. This character is not a minor, nor is it meant to simulate one. It is simply designed to simulate HuoHuo as she is as a character in Honkai Star Rail.
